STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K/P GRAPHICS, A DIVISION OF K/P COMPANIES AN OREGAN CORPORATION QUALIFIED TO, AND           DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHITECH INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP $3,121.83 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,121.83, SEE STIPULATED JUDGMENT ON FILE FOR FULL TERMS & CONDITIONS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF K/P GRAPHICS, A DIVISION OF K/P COMPANIES AN OREGAN CORPORATION QUALIFIED TO, AND           DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHITECH INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP $3,321.83 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $498.27 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,590.10
